_comment: Gym layout + equipment inventory. zones is a line graph A-B-C-D-E; the generator keeps supersets within same/adjacent zones and prefers to walk the line without backtracking. inventory ladders drive the load rounder. All editable from the app Settings screen.

crowd._note: On busy weekdays the generator steers away from movements that can ONLY be done in a crowded zone (the bench/DB end A and the machines C), preferring the rigs (B), open floor (E), and cardio (D) that stay open. A movement with an alternative zone isn't penalized — you just do it in the open spot.

inventory._note: Weights in lb unless marked kg. The rounder snaps suggestions to the nearest achievable value per implement.

barbells.note: either person may use either bar; pick per session
